subject: Aircraft sale update
body:
Jeffrey,
Ben has a Global Express 5000 that will deliver new in 90 days,  price 42M.
He would like me to send a spec sheet on our S76 and B727. is this  OK?, I 
can fwd him a spec sheet with Bristol and Assoc. name on cover  page.
 
Sean is selling Limited's Global Express 5000 for 46.5M. Sean  said Morris 
has been speaking to Limited on that aircraft, it "may" be same, not  sure. 
Limited is not happy with Global 5000.
 
Sean has been in contact with Wendy at "Wentworth Aero" they  specialize in 
Private Airliner sales. Sean voiced concern if I send our spec  sheet to Ben 
that it would be all over the Internet.
please visit this web sight, they are interested in our Boeing for  there 
inventory.
 _http://www.wentworth.aero/Gallery-Aircraft-Listings.htm_ 
(http://www.wentworth.aero/Gallery-Aircraft-Listings.htm) 
 
George has confirmed that he has a Dec 07 green S76C++ available,  12.1M to 
us or 12.5M ask to public. We paid 10.9M total for our  S76C++.
 
Please advise if you want Sean to have exclusive on Boeing sale and  
officially market now?
Ask price 11 million.
L.V.



************************************** See what's new at http://www.aol.com
body_html:
Jeffrey,
Ben has a Global Express 5000 that will deliver new in 90 days, price 42M.
He would like me to send a spec sheet on our S76 and B727. is this OK?, I can fwd him a spec sheet with Bristol and Assoc. name on cover page.
 
Sean is selling Limited's Global Express 5000 for 46.5M. Sean said Morris has been speaking to Limited on that aircraft, it "may" be same, not sure. Limited is not happy with Global 5000.
 
Sean has been in contact with Wendy at "Wentworth Aero" they specialize in Private Airliner sales. Sean voiced concern if I send our spec sheet to Ben that it would be all over the Internet.
please visit this web sight, they are interested in our Boeing for there inventory.
 http://www.wentworth.aero/Gallery-Aircraft-Listings.htm
 
George has confirmed that he has a Dec 07 green S76C++ available, 12.1M to us or 12.5M ask to public. We paid 10.9M total for our S76C++.
 
Please advise if you want Sean to have exclusive on Boeing sale and officially market now?
Ask price 11 million.
L.V.
